title: polypodium pellucidum
intro: Polypodium pellucidum, also known as Chinese polypody or Five-leaf Polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Polypodium pellucidum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. Polypodium pellucidum is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal formulations to support immune function and overall well-being.
